parameters.jsCode: const item=$input.first().json;const body=item.body&&typeof item.body==='object'?item.body:item;const text=(...values)=>values.find((value)=>typeof value==='string'&&value.trim())?.trim()||'';const lower=(value)=>text(value).toLowerCase();const companyName=text(body.companyName,body.company,body.businessName,'Unknown company');const market=text(body.market,body.country,body.region,'Morocco');const problem=text(body.problem,body.challenge,body.request,body.message);const channel=lower(body.channel,body.source,'website');const urgency=lower(body.urgency,body.timeline,'standard');const budget=lower(body.budget,body.budgetRange);const language=text(body.language,body.preferredLanguage,'fr');const hasProblem=problem.length>=20;const hasBudget=Boolean(budget);const isHighUrgency=['urgent','this week','asap','now'].some((term)=>urgency.includes(term));const isWarmChannel=['intch','referral','partner','whatsapp'].some((term)=>channel.includes(term));const isMoroccanMarket=['morocco','maroc','ma','casablanca','rabat','marrakech','tanger','agadir'].some((term)=>lower(market).includes(term));const score=[hasProblem,hasBudget,isHighUrgency,isWarmChannel,isMoroccanMarket].filter(Boolean).length;const qualification=score>=4?'hot':score>=2?'warm':'early';let recommendedOffer='Free AI Opportunity Audit';if(qualification==='hot'){recommendedOffer='Business Automation Sprint';}else if(problem.match(/app|mvp|platform|dashboard|portal/i)){recommendedOffer='MVP/App Launch Sprint';}else if(problem.match(/whatsapp|support|customer|lead|sales/i)){recommendedOffer='AI WhatsApp Assistant';}const nextAction=qualification==='hot'?'Book a discovery call and prepare a paid pilot proposal.':'Offer a free 30-minute AI audit and collect workflow details.';const capturedAt=new Date().toISOString();const leadSlug=companyName.toUpperCase().replace(/[^A-Z0-9]+/g,'-').replace(/^-|-$/g,'').slice(0,28)||'LEAD';const leadId=`SAE-${capturedAt.slice(0,10).replaceAll('-','')}-${leadSlug}`;const summary=`${companyName} is a ${qualification} lead for ${recommendedOffer}.`;const persistenceRecord={leadId,companyName,market,language,sourceChannel:channel,problem,urgency,budget,qualification,score,recommendedOffer,nextAction,status:qualification==='hot'?'Discovery call needed':'Audit offered',capturedAt,tags:['sae','nexusai',qualification,recommendedOffer.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g,'-')],cndpNote:'Store only lead-intake data needed for follow-up; confirm CNDP and client data requirements before adding sensitive fields.'};const notification={shouldNotify:qualification==='hot',priority:qualification==='hot'?'high':'normal',channels:['whatsapp','email','slack-or-telegram'],title:`Hot SAE lead: ${companyName}`,message:`${summary} Source: ${channel}. Market: ${market}. Next action: ${nextAction}`,callToAction:nextAction};const proposalDraft={title:`${recommendedOffer} for ${companyName}`,opening:`Thanks for sharing the challenge. Based on the intake, the best next step is ${recommendedOffer}.`,diagnosis:[`Main problem: ${problem||'Needs discovery.'}`,`Market context: ${market}`,`Lead temperature: ${qualification} (${score}/5)`],proposedScope:['Map the current workflow and success criteria.','Ship a working first automation or app slice.','Review results and define the next paid rollout.'],firstMilestone:qualification==='hot'?'Prepare a paid pilot proposal after discovery call.':'Run the free AI opportunity audit first.',discoveryQuestions:['Which workflow currently costs the most time each week?','Who owns the follow-up after a lead or customer message arrives?','Which tools must the automation connect to first?'],aiPrompt:`Write a concise professional proposal for ${companyName}. Offer: ${recommendedOffer}. Problem: ${problem}. Market: ${market}. Tone: confident, practical, bilingual-friendly for Moroccan B2B.`};const connectorTargets={notion:'Create a database item using persistenceRecord fields.',airtable:'Create a record using persistenceRecord as fields.',googleSheets:'Append one row from persistenceRecord values.',crm:'Create or update a lead, then attach proposalDraft and notification.message.'};return[{json:{saeTemplate:'first-ai-opportunity-intake',status:'qualified',leadId,companyName,market,language,sourceChannel:channel,qualification,score,recommendedOffer,nextAction,summary,capturedAt,persistenceRecord,notification,proposalDraft,connectorTargets}}];
